<blockquote>
'''''Figure''': The picture of the African political map zoomed in on Rwanda to illustrate an [[Glossary:Item|item]] about the assassination of the President Habyarimana in 1994. In the picture, you can see a [[Glossary:Cloze_deletion|cloze deletion]] produced from the [https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/History_of_Rwanda History of Rwanda] article. In this [[Glossary:Element|element]], however, the African political map is zoomed in on Rwanda (and the neighboring nations). The original picture is zoomed in without cropping the original picture file. Zoomed pictures are marked with a border, which is colored <span style="padding: 3px; background: lime;">bright lime</span> in [[Glossary:Zoom&trim_mode|zoom&amp;trim mode]] and <span style="padding: 3px; color: #fff; background: red;">red</span> in the [[Glossary:Presentation_mode|display mode]]. If you do not crop the picture, it will remain unchanged (whether zoomed or unzoomed) in all [[Glossary:Element|elements]] that use it (including other [[Glossary:Extract|extracts]] from the [https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/History_of_Rwanda History of Rwanda] article).''
</blockquote>
